_comment: Example 2 — HIPAA-regulated patient portal. PHI, customers + employees, moderate-to-high availability. Exercises: HIPAA + HITRUST CSF mapping, PHI-specific audit events (6-year retention), Cognito-style customer identity, restricted data classification.

business.businessProblem: Lets patients view their records, message clinicians, and schedule appointments without calling the front desk.
business.userInteractionDescription: Patients sign in over the web/mobile; clinicians use an internal staff console; messages are exchanged through a regulated chat channel.

impact.confidentialityWorstCase: Disclosure of PHI triggers HHS notification, fines, and lawsuits.
impact.integrityWorstCase: Altered clinical data risks patient safety and malpractice exposure.
impact.availabilityWorstCase: Patients cannot reach providers; safety events escalate to clinical risk.
